Hardware Component File

DSMU_SWEET200_SWEET400_V7

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference DSMU_SWEET200_SWEET400_V7_20211022T132750.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 74F
Receive ID 76F
Functional Addr 2A
Functional Name DSMU_ADP

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "B517",
    "soft": "SEAT_N603",
    "version": "SEAT_N603"
  }
]

function.bit7Motors DTC function.bit6Motors DTC function.bit5Motors DTC function.bit4Motors DTC function.bit3Motors DTC function.bit2Motors DTC function.bit1Motors DTC function.bit0CF-Soft stroke
